# API Surface Baseline

main_backend_route_count=111
memory_backend_route_count=53
total_route_count=164

## chat_app_server_rs/src/api (.route lines)
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/agent_builder.rs: Router::new().route("/api/agent-builder/ai-create", post(ai_create))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/applications.rs: .route(
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/applications.rs: .route("/", get(list_apps).post(create_app))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/auth.rs: .route("/api/auth/login", post(login))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/auth.rs: .route("/api/auth/me", axum::routing::get(me))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/auth.rs: .route("/api/auth/register", post(register))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route(
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route(
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route("/api/agent_v2/chat/stream", post(agent_chat_stream))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route("/api/agent_v2/status", get(agent_status))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route("/api/agent_v2/tools", get(agent_tools))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v2.rs: .route("/api/chat/stop", post(stop_chat))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route(
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route("/api/agent_v3/chat/guide", post(submit_runtime_guidance))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route("/api/agent_v3/chat/stop", post(stop_chat))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route("/api/agent_v3/chat/stream", post(agent_chat_stream))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route("/api/agent_v3/status", get(agent_status))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/chat_v3.rs: .route("/api/agent_v3/tools", get(agent_tools))

chat_app_server_rs/src/api/fs.rs: .route("/api/fs/entries", get(list_entries))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/fs.rs: .route("/api/fs/list", get(list_dirs))

chat_app_server_rs/src/api/messages.rs: .route("/api/messages", get(list_messages).post(create_message))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/messages.rs: .route("/api/messages/:id", get(get_message).delete(delete_message))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/mod.rs: .route("/", axum::routing::get(root))
chat_app_server_rs/src/api/mod.rs: .route("/health", axum::routing::get(health))
